chemicalDescription: s-Enterobacteria Phage T4 Decapeptide-1 SP Trifluoroacetate is the trifluoroacetate salt of a single chain peptide produced synthetically to be identical to a portion of the protein, Endonuclease V, which is found in Enterobacteria Phage T4. It contains 10 amino acids consisting of alanine, glycine, isoleucine, lysine, phenylalanine, tryptophan, and tyrosine. The parent protein contains a maximum of 138 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylations.

Polyurethane-101 is a urethane polymer that is prepared by a multi-step process. First, Isophorone Diisocyanate is reacted with polyester polyol made by condensing Adipic Acid with Glycol. The resulting polymer is reacted with Dimethylolpropionic Acid then neutralized with Triethylamine and dispersed into water.

chemicalDescription: This is the product obtained by the fermentation of an extract of the bark of Mallotus japonicus; the bulbs of Allium cepa, and Allium sativum; the flowers of Carthamus tinctorius, and Chamomilla recutita; the fruits of Actinidia polygama, Ananas sativus, Capsicum frutescens, Citrus grandis, Citrus limon, Citrus unshiu, Cucumis melo, Ficus carica, Fortunella margarita, Lycium chinense, Prunus armeniaca, Prunus mume, Pseudocydonia sinensis, Malus domestica, Siraitia grosvenorii , Vitis vinifera, and Ziziphus jujuba; the fruiting bodies of Agarcius blazei, Ganoderma lucidum, Lentinula edodes; the hulls of Allium cepa; the leaves of Amygdalus persica, Brassica oleracea capitata, Commelina communis, Corchorus olitorius, Diospyros kaki, Eriobotrya japonica, Eucommia ulmoides , Ficus carica, Ginkgo biloba, Lycium chinense , Morus alba, Nandina domestica, Nelumbo nucifera, Perilla frutescens, and Pinus densiflora; the leaves and stems of Lonicera japonica; the roots of Arctium lappa, Daucus carota sativa, Eleutherococcus senticosus, Eurycoma longifolia, Glycyrrhiza glabra, Platycodon grandiflorus, Salacia reticulata, Taraxacum officinale, and Zingiber officinale; the roots and stems of Curcuma longa; the seeds of Cassia obtusifolia, and Coix lacryma-Jobi ma-yuen; the stems of Sambucus sieboldiana; the whole plants, Acer maximowiczianum, Andrographis paniculata, Artemisia princeps, Aspalathus linearis, Carum petroselinum, Equisetum arvense, Glechoma hederacea, Gloiopeltis tenax, Gynostemma pentaphyllum, Houttuynia cordata, Hypericum erectum, Lepidium meyenii, Panax ginseng, Panax notoginseng, Phaseolus radiatus, Phyllanthus emblica, Plantago asiatica, Polygonatum odoratum, Rabdosia japonica, Saccharina japoni

chemicalDescription: This is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of the fruits of Citrus unshiu , Cornus officinalis , Euterpe oleracea , Fragaria ananassa, Lycium chinense, Prunus mume, Prunus salicina, Pyrus malus, Rosa canina , Rubus idaeus, Schisandra chinensis, Vaccinium angustifolium, Vaccinium macrocarpon, and Vitis vinifera; the leaves of Allium tuberosum , Cymbopogon schoenanthus , Lactuca scariola sativa, Rosmarinus officinalis, Spinacia oleracea, Thymus vulgaris, and Vaccinium myrtillus ; the roots of Imperata cylindrica ; the seeds of Glycine max, Hordeum distichon, Oryza sativa, Phaseolus angularis, and Phaseolus radiatus ; the whole plants, Brassica oleracea, Eriocephalus punctulatus and Viscum album; Acrylates/C10-30 Alkyl Acrylate Crosspolymer, Alpha-Glucan, Betaine, Butylene Glycol, Epigallocatechin Gallate, Glycereth-26, Glycerin, Glucosyl Ceramide, Hesperidin, Hydrolyzed Hyaluronic Acid, Maltodextrin, Panthenol, Sclerotium Gum, Tromethamine and Xanthan Gum, by the microorganisms Acetobacter, Bacillus, Lactobacillus, Saccharomyces, and Streptococcus.

Aurantiochytrium sp. AB811026 Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of a growth media by the microorganism Aurantiochytrium sp. AB811026. Aurantiochytrium sp. AB811026 refers to a specific strain of Aurantiochytrium that has been registered with the accession number AB811026. This strain is very closely related to the species Aurantiochytrium limacinum and Aurantiochytrium mangrovei.
(Angelica Gigas/Cnidium Officinale/Paeonia Lactiflora) Root Extract is the extract of the roots of Angelica gigas , Cnidium officinale and Paeonia lactiflora.

Artemisia Capillaris Flower/Leaf/Stem Extract is the extract of the flowers, leaves and stems of Artemisia capillaris.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: (Alpinia Zerumbet/Artemisia Princeps/Averrhoa Carambola/Camellia Sinensis/Eriobotrya Japonica/Ginkgo Biloba/Melissa Officinalis/Mentha Piperita/Olea Europaea/Origanum Majorana/Perilla Frutescens/Prunus Persica/Salvia Officinalis) Leaf Extract
chemicalDescription: (Alpinia Zerumbet/Artemisia Princeps/Averrhoa Carambola/Camellia Sinensis/Eriobotrya Japonica/Ginkgo Biloba/Melissa Officinalis/Mentha Piperita/Olea Europaea/Origanum Majorana/Perilla Frutescens/Prunus Persica/Salvia Officinalis) Leaf Extract is the extract of the leaves of Alpinia zerumbet , Artemisia princeps , Averrhoa carambola , Camellia sinensis , Eriobotrya japonica , Ginkgo biloba , Melissa officinalis , Mentha piperita , Olea europaea , Origanum majorana , Perilla frutescens , Prunus persica and Salvia officinalis (the accepted scientific name for Mentha piperita is Mentha x piperita).
inciName: (ALPINIA ZERUMBET/ARTEMISIA PRINCEPS/AVERRHOA CARAMBOLA/CAMELLIA SINENSIS/ERIOBOTRYA JAPONICA/GINKGO BILOBA/MELISSA OFFICINALIS/MENTHA PIPERITA/OLEA EUROPAEA/ORIGANUM MAJORANA/PERILLA FRUTESCENS/PRUNUS PERSICA/SALVIA OFFICINALIS) LEAF EXTRACT

chemicalDescription: PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil/IPDI Copolymer is a copolymer of PEG-40 Hydrogenated Castor Oil and Isophorone Diisocyanate.
Lactobacillus/Smilax China Leaf Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of the leaves of Smilax china by the microorganism, Lactobacillus.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: Leuconostoc/Argyranthemum Frutescens Callus Ferment Extract Filtrate
chemicalDescription: Leuconostoc/Argyranthemum Frutescens Callus Ferment Extract Filtrate is a filtrate of the extract of the product obtained by the fermentation of the callus of Argyranthemum frutescens, by the microorganism Leuconostoc.
inciName: LEUCONOSTOC/ARGYRANTHEMUM FRUTESCENS CALLUS FERMENT EXTRACT FILTRATE

chemicalDescription: Ziziphus Mauritiana Leaf is the leaf of Ziziphus mauritiana. (The accepted scientific name for Ziziphus mauritianamauritiana is Ziziphus mauritiana).
Sapindus Saponaria Fruit Extract is the extract of the fruit of Sapindus saponaria.
Camellia Sinensis Callus is the callus of Camellia sinensis grown in culture.

chemicalName: Siloxanes and Silicones, di-Me, vinyl groupterminated, polymers with 1,1,3,3-tetramethyldisiloxane, 3-[3-[bis(2-hydroxypropyl)amino]-2-hydroxypropoxy]propyl group-terminated
chemicalDescription: Bis-Diisopropanolamino-PG-Propyl Disiloxane/Bis-Vinyl Dimethicone Copolymer is the copolymer that conforms generally to the formula:
Citrus Latifolia Fruit Juice is the juice expressed from the fruit of Citrus latifolia. (The accepted scientific name for Citrus latifolia is Citrus x latifolia).
Propanediol Caprylate is the organic compound that conforms to the formula:
Sodium Silver Mercaptobenzimidazole Sulfonate is the organic salt that conforms to the formula
Microcitrus Australasica Fruit Extract is the extract of the fruit of Microcitrus australasica.
Microcitrus Australis Fruit Extract is the extract of the fruit of Microcitrus Australis, Rutaceae.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: MONASCUS/HIPPOPHAE RHAMNOIDES FRUIT/SOYBEAN EXTRACT FERMENT FILTRATE
chemicalDescription: Monascus/Hippophae Rhamnoides Fruit/Soybean Extract Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of the fruit of Hippophae rhamnoides and Glycine Soja Extract by the microorganism, Monascus.
inciName: MONASCUS/HIPPOPHAE RHAMNOIDES FRUIT/SOYBEAN EXTRACT FERMENT FILTRATE

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: CENTELLA ASIATICA MERISTEM CELL CULTURE EXTRACT
chemicalDescription: Centella Asiatica Meristem Cell Culture Extract is the extract of Centella Asiatica Meristem Cell Culture
inciName: CENTELLA ASIATICA MERISTEM CELL CULTURE EXTRACT

chemicalDescription: Propyl Grapevine Shoot Extract Olivate is the product obtained by the reaction of Olive Acid with the propyl ether of an extract of the shoots of the vines of the grape, Vitis vinifera.
Macrocystis Pyrifera Extract is an extract of the Giant Kelp, Macrocystis pyrifera (L.), Phaeophytae
Methylheptyl Laurate is the organic compound.
Zea Mays (Corn) Stalk Extract is the extract of the stalks of the corn, Zea mays, Poaceae.
Hyaluronic Acid/Polyisopropylacrylamide Copolymer is a grafted polymer that is made by coupling Hyaluronic Acid to an amine-terminated polymer of Isopropylacrylamide.
Coumaroyl sh-Pentapeptide-5 is the product obtained by the reaction of coumaric acid and sh-Pentapeptide-5

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: NOSTOC COMMUNE/HYDRANGEA SERRATA LEAF/SOYBEAN FERMENT FILTRATE
chemicalDescription: Nostoc Commune/Hydrangea Serrata Leaf/Soybean Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of soybeans and the leaves of Hydrangea serrata by the microorgansim, Nostoc commune.
inciName: NOSTOC COMMUNE/HYDRANGEA SERRATA LEAF/SOYBEAN FERMENT FILTRATE

chemicalDescription: Maackia Amurensis Branch Extract is the extract of the branches of Maackia amurensis, Fabaceae.
C12-16 Alkoxy Hydroxypropyl Ethyl Hydroxyethylcellulose is a C12-16 alkoxyhydroxypropyl derivative of the ethyl ether of Hydroxyethylcellulose.
Hydrolyzed Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice is the hydrolysate of Aloe Barbadensis Leaf Juice derived by acid, enzyme or other method of hydrolysis.
Amaranthus Caudatus Seed Oil is the oil expressed from the seeds of Amaranthus caudatus, Amarathaceae.
Hematite Powder is the powder obtained from finely ground Hematite. See "Regulatory and Ingredient Use Information," for Colorants in Volume 1, Introduction, Part A.
Eryngium Maritimum Callus Culture Filtrate is a filtrate of a culture of the callus of Eryngium maritimum, Apiaceae.
Hygrophila Ringens Seed is the seed of Hygrophila ringens.

Methionyl r-Salmon Oligopeptide-1 sh-Polypeptide-51 is a single chain recombinant fusion peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from r-Salmon Oligopeptide-1 (q.v.) and sh-Polypeptide-51 with the code for methionine. The fused peptide contains 237 amino acids and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Pyrus Communis Flower Water is an aqueous solution of the steam distillates obtained from the flowers of Pyrus communis, Rosaceae

Polyacrylate-32 is a copolymer of PEG/PPG-23/6 Dimethicone , sodium acryloyldimethyltaurate, citraconic anhydride and one or more monomers of acrylic acid, methacrylic acid or one of their simple esters.
Camellia Sinensis Leaf/Iron Hydroxide Powder is the powder obtained by the complex formed from Camellia Sinensis Leaf Powder and Iron Hydroxide.
Sedimentary Rock Powder is the powder obtained from finely ground sedimentary rock
Magnolia Grandiflora Flower Extract is the extract of the flowers of Magnolia grandiflora, Magnoliaceae
Heptapeptide-17 is the synthetic peptide consitsting of asparagine, leucine, serine and threonine.
Nicotinoyl Dipeptide-26 is the product obtained by the reaction of Niacin and Dipeptide-26.
Carnitine Tartrate is the salt of Carnitine and Tartaric Acid.
Artemisia Princeps Callus Extract is the extract of the callus of Artemisia princeps grown in culture.

Polydatin Glucoside is the organic compound that conforms to the formula. See Reported Ingredient Functions-The Cosmetic Drug Distinction, in Regulatory and Ingredient Use Information, Volume I, Part A.
Pouteria Sapota Seed Butter is the fat obtained from the seeds of Pouteria sapota, Sapotaceae.
Prunus Armeniaca (Apricot) Kernel Wax is the wax obtained from the kernels of Prunus armeniaca.
Trimethylcyclohexyl Butylcarbamate is the organic compound

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: HUMAN BUFFY COAT CELL CONDITIONED MEDIA
chemicalDescription: Human Buffy Coat Cell Conditioned Media is the growth media removed from cultures of human buffy coat cells after several days of growth. The starting media is Dulbecco's Modified Eagle Medium, and may or may not contain fetal bovine serum.
inciName: HUMAN BUFFY COAT CELL CONDITIONED MEDIA

chemicalDescription: Lithothamnion Tophiforme Powder is the finely, ground powder derived from the alga, Lithothamnion tophiforme.
Schkuhria Pinnata Extract is the extract of the whole plant, Schkuhria pinnata, Asteraceae.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: LENTINUS EDODES MYCELIUM FERMENT FILTRATE EXTRACT
chemicalDescription: Lentinus Edodes Mycelium Ferment Filtrate Extract is the extract of a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of Lentinus edodes mycelium, Marasmiaceae.
inciName: LENTINUS EDODES MYCELIUM FERMENT FILTRATE EXTRACT

chemicalDescription: Oligopeptide-111 is the synthetic peptide containing 11 amino acids consisting of aspartic acid, lysine, leucine, asparagine, glutamine, arginine, and serine.
Hydrolyzed Spider Web is the hydrolysate of spider webs derived by acid, enzyme or other method of hydrolysis.

chemicalName: Butanedioic acid, 2,3-dihydroxy- (2R,3R)-, C12-14-branched and linear alkyl esters, polymers with 5-isocyanato-1-(isocyanatomethyl)-1,3,3-trimethylcyclohexane and (1-methylethylidene)bis[4,1-phenyleneoxy(2-hydroxy-3,1-propanediyl)] diacrylate, 2-hydroxyethyl methacrylate-blocked
chemicalDescription: Polyurethane-69 is a copolymer of Isopropylidenediphenyl Bisoxyhydroxypropyl Methacrylate , Isophorone Diisocyanate (IPDI), and Di-C12-13 Alkyl Tartrate, end-capped with hydroxyethyl methacrylate (HEMA).
Artemisia Argyi Leaf Extract is the extract of the leaves of  Artemisia argyi,  Asteraceae.

sh-Polypeptide-93 is a single chain synthetic human peptide, produced by fermentation in  E. coli.  The starting gene is a synthesized copy of the human gene which codes for Connective Tissue Growth Factor used as such or adapted to the production host. It contains a maximum of 349 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation. The protein consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

sh-Oligopeptide-1 sh-Polypeptide-94 Dipeptide-35 sh-Polypeptide-94 sh-Polypeptide-95 is a single chain synthetic fusion peptide, produced by fermentation in Chinese hamster ovary cells (CHO). The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from sh-Oligopeptide-1, sh-Polypeptide-94, Dipeptide-35, and sh-Polypeptide-95.
Passiflora Edulis Meristem Cell Extract is the extract of the cultured meristem cells of Passiflora edulis, Passifloraceae.
Coix Lacryma-Jobi Ma-yuen Bran Oil is the oil expressed from the bran of  Coix lacryma-jobi  ma-yuen, Poaceae.
Aspergillus/Hippophae Rhamnoides Seed Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of the seeds of Hippophae rhamnoides, by the microorganism Aspergillus oryzae.
Cirsium Rhinoceros Extract is the extract of the whole plant, Cirsium rhinoceros, Asteraceae.
Polyglyceryl-6 Trilaurate is the triester of lauric acid and Polyglycerin-6.

sh-Heptapeptide-2 is a single chain human peptide, produced synthetically to be identical to a portion of the protein, Cofilin-1, and contains 7 amino acids consisting of alanine, aspartic acid, isoleucine, leucine and lysine.

sh-Hexapeptide-4 is a single chain human peptide, produced synthetically to be identical to a portion of the protein, Peroxisome proliferator-activated receptor gamma coactivator 1-alpha, and contains 6 amino acids consisting of proline and threonine.
Ligustrum Lucidum Leaf Extract is the extract of the leaves of Ligustrum lucidum, Oleaceae.
Cotinus Coggygria Leaf Extract is the extract of the leaves of Cotinus coggygria, Anacardiaceae.
(Trifolium Pratense (Clover)/Vigna Radiata) Sprout Extract is the extract of the sprouts of Trifolium pratense and Vigna radiata.
Ettlia Texensis Oil is the oil expressed from the alga, Ettlia texensis grown in culture.
Pinus Koraiensis Needle Extract is the extract of the needles of Pinus koraiensis, Pinaceae.

Oligopeptide-91 sh-Polypeptide-85 is a single chain synthetic fusion peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from Oligopeptide-91 and sh-Polypeptide-85. The fusion peptide contains 228 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Botrytis Cinerea/Ginseng Fruit Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation the fruit of Panax ginseng by the microorganism, Botrytis cinerea.
Pyrus Serotina Callus Extract is the extract of the callus of Pyrus serotina grown in culture, Rosaceae.
Aspergillus/Gelatin/Rice Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained from the fermentation of Gelatin and the grains of  Oryza sativa  (rice) by the microorganism,  Aspergillus
Curcuma Longa (Turmeric) Callus Lysate is the product obtained from the lysis of the cultured callus cells of Curcuma longa, Zingiberaceae.
Penthorum Chinense Seed Extract is the extract obtained from the seeds of Penthorum chinense, Penthoraceae.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: Forsythia Viridissima Fruit/(Actaea Dahurica/Glycyrrhiza Glabra/Paeonia Lactiflora/Platycodon Grandiflorus/Pueraria Montana) Root Extract
chemicalDescription: Forsythia Viridissima Fruit/(Actaea Dahurica/Glycyrrhiza Glabra (Licorice)/Paeonia Lactiflora/Platycodon Grandiflorus/Pueraria Montana) Root Extract is the extract of the fruit of Forsythia viridissima and the roots of Actaea dahurica , Glycyrrhiza glabra , Paeonia lactiflora , Platycodon grandiflorus and Pueraria montana.
inciName: FORSYTHIA VIRIDISSIMA FRUIT/(ACTAEA DAHURICA/GLYCYRRHIZA GLABRA/PAEONIA LACTIFLORA/PLATYCODON GRANDIFLORUS/PUERARIA MONTANA) ROOT EXTRACT
inciUsaName: Forsythia Viridissima Fruit/(Actaea Dahurica/Glycyrrhiza Glabra (Licorice)/Paeonia Lactiflora/Platycodon Grandiflorus/Pueraria Montana) Root Extract

chemicalDescription: r-(s-Rainbow Trout Oligopeptide-1 sh-Polypeptide-72) is a single chain fusion peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from sr-Rainbow Trout Oligopeptide-1 and sh-Polypeptide-72. The fusion peptide contains 180 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: R-(SH-POLYPEPTIDE-111 OLIGOPEPTIDE-163 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-117 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-94 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-95 PENTAPEPTIDE-63 OLIGOPEPTIDE-163 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-6) DIMER
chemicalDescription: This peptide is a dimer linked by a disulfide bridge between the cysteines, consisting of a single chain synthetic fusion peptide, produced by fermentation in Chinese Hamster Ovary (CHO). The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from sh-Polypeptide-111, Oligopeptide-163, sh-Polypeptide-117, sh-Polypeptide-94, sh-Polypeptide-95, and Pentapeptide-63. This fusion protein binds to Immunoglobulin E (IgE) and Interleukin-10 (IL-10) receptors; and it contains 605 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 amino acids.
inciName: R-(SH-POLYPEPTIDE-111 OLIGOPEPTIDE-163 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-117 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-94 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-95 PENTAPEPTIDE-63 OLIGOPEPTIDE-163 SH-POLYPEPTIDE-6) DIMER

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: LACTOBACILLUS/HONEYSUCKLE BUD/(EPIMEDIUM KOREANUM/HOUTTUYNIA CORDATA FLOWER/LEAF/STEM)/(ARCTIUM LAPPA/FORSYTHIA FRUIT)/CNIDIUM OFFICINALE RHIZOME/(LICORICE/POLYGONUM CUSPIDATUM RHIZOME/ROOT)/(ANGELICA GIGAS/ARALIA CONTINENTALIS/AUCKLANDIA LAPPA/LITHOSPERMUM ERYTHRORHIZON/PANAX GINSENG/SANGUISORBA OFFICINALIS/SAPOSHNIKOVIA DIVARICATA/SCROPHULARIA BUERGERIANA/SCUTELLARIA BAICALENSIS/SOPHORA FLAVESCENS ROOT)/ZIZYPHUS JUJUBA SEED EXTRACT FERMENT
chemicalDescription: This is the product obtained by the fermentation of the extract of the buds of Lonicera japonica; the flowers, leaves and stems of Epimedium koreanum, and Houttuynia cordata; the fruits of Arctium lappa and Forsythia suspensa; the rhizomes of Cnidium officinale; the rhizomes and roots of Glycyrrhiza uralensis, and Polygonum cuspidatum; the roots of Angelica gigas, Aralia continentalis, Aucklandia lappa, Lithospermum erythrorhizon, Panax ginseng, Sanguisorba officinalis, Saposhnikovia divaricata, Scrophularia buergeriana, Scutellaria baicalensis and Sophora flavescens; the seeds of Zizyphus jujuba; by the microorganism Lactobacillus.
inciName: LACTOBACILLUS/HONEYSUCKLE BUD/(EPIMEDIUM KOREANUM/HOUTTUYNIA CORDATA FLOWER/LEAF/STEM)/(ARCTIUM LAPPA/FORSYTHIA FRUIT)/CNIDIUM OFFICINALE RHIZOME/(LICORICE/POLYGONUM CUSPIDATUM RHIZOME/ROOT)/(ANGELICA GIGAS/ARALIA CONTINENTALIS/AUCKLANDIA LAPPA/LITHOSPERMUM ERYTHRORHIZON/PANAX GINSENG/SANGUISORBA OFFICINALIS/SAPOSHNIKOVIA DIVARICATA/SCROPHULARIA BUERGERIANA/SCUTELLARIA BAICALENSIS/SOPHORA FLAVESCENS ROOT)/ZIZYPHUS JUJUBA SEED EXTRACT FERMENT

chemicalDescription: Sinomenium Acutum Branch/Leaf Extract is the extract of the branches and leaves of Sinomenium acutum, Menispermaceae.
Nonapeptide-35 is the synthetic peptide consisting of alanine, aspartic acid, glycine, leucine, serine, and valine.

Oligopeptide-91 sh-Polypeptide-1 is a single chain synthetic fusion peptide, produced by fermentation in E. coli. The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from Oligopeptide-91 and sh-Polypeptide-1.

Grape/Linseed/Olive/Sunflower Glycerides is a mixture of the mono-, di-, and triglycerides of the fatty acids derived from Vitis Vinifera (Grape) Seed Oil, Linum Usitatissimum (Linseed) Seed Oil, Olea Europaea (Olive) Fruit Oil and Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil.

s-Clostridium Botulinum Decapeptide-2 is a single chain peptide produced synthetically to be identical to a portion of the protein, Botulinum Neurotoxin Type A, which is found in the bacteria,  Clostridium botulinum. It contains 10 amino acids consisting of alanine, asparagine, aspartic acid, glycine, isoleucine, lysine, tyrosine, and valine. The parent protein contains a maximum of 1296 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Madhuca Longifolia Sophorolipids are glycolipids produced by the fermentation of glucose by Starmerella bombicola with the fatty acids derived from  Madhuca longifolia seed oil, Sapotaceae.
Artemisia Scoparia Extract is the extract of the whole plant Artemisia scoparia, Asteraceae.
Mentha Canadensis Leaf/Stem Oil is the volatile oil obtained from the leaves and stems of Mentha Canadensis, Lamiaceae.
Sphagneticola Trilobata Extract is the extract of the whole plant Sphagneticola trilobata, Asteraceae.

sh-Pentapeptide-6 SP is a single chain human peptide produced synthetically to be identical to a portion of the protein Adiponectin, and contains 5 amino acids consisting of glycine, leucine, phenylalanine and tyrosine. The parent protein contains a maximum of 244 amino acids which may contain disulfide bonds and/or glycosylation, and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Diphylleia Grayi Callus Extract is the extract of the callus of Diphylleia grayi, Berberidaceae, grown in culture.
Cupressus Sempervirens Branch/Leaf Oil is the volatile oil obtained from the branches and leaves of Cupressus sempervirens, Cupressaceae.
Oryza Sativa Bran/Germ Oil is the oil derived from the bran and germ of Oryza sativa, Poaceae.

(Bifidobacterium/Polysorbate 80 Ferment + Lactobacillus/Polysorbate 80 Ferment) Lysate Filtrate is the filtrate of a lysate of the mixture of the products obtained through the fermentation of Bifidobacterium with Polysorbate 80, and through the fermentation of Lactobacillus with polysorbate 80.
Adenophora Taquetii Extract is the extract of the whole plant,  Adenophora taquetii.

Pyroglutamyl Dipeptide-30 Amide is the peptide produced synthetically to be identical to a portion of the protein, Thyrotropin-Releasing Hormone, and consists of pyroglutamic acid and Dipeptide-30, in which the N-terminus is an amide. Thyrotropin-Releasing Hormone contains a maximum of 242 amino acids.
Acetylglutaminoyl Farnesylcysteine is the organic compound that conforms to the formula
Rhododendron Ferrugineum Flower Extract is the extract of the flowers of  Rhododendron ferrugineum, Ericaceae

Oligopeptide-123 rh-Polypeptide-1 is a single chain synthetic fusion peptide, produced by fermentation in  E. coli.  The starting gene is synthesized by the fusion of the gene from rh-Polypeptide-1 and Oligopeptide-123 . The fusion peptide contains a maximum of 288 amino acids and consists of the proper sequence of the 20 standard amino acids.
Tetrapeptide-47 is the synthetic peptide consisting of methionine and cysteine.

Behenylcarbamoylpropyl Polysilsesquioxane is a resinous material composed of a mixture of three-dimensional siloxane polymers and oligomers with cage structures. For the oligomers, each silicon atom in the polysilsesquioxane is connected via oxygen atoms to three other silicon atoms and can be represented by the empirical formulation RSiO3/2 where R represents the behenylcarbamoylpropyl group. For the larger polymeric polysilsesquioxanes, some of the silicon atoms are not connected to other silicon atoms and instead have a silanol (SiOH) group.
Dipteryx Odorata Seed Oil is the volatile oil derived from the seeds of  Dipteryx odorata, Fabaceae.

Lactobacillus/Bambusa Arundinacea Juice/Sucrose Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of Bambusa Arundinacea Juice and Sucrose by the microorganism,  Lactobacillus.
Oligopeptide-120 is the synthetic peptide containing 12 amino acids consisting of arginine, asparagine, aspartic acid, glutamic acid, isoleucine, lysine, proline, valine, and tyrosine.
Neatsfoot Oil is a fixed oil obtained from cattle feet.
Rosin is the residue left after distilling off the volatile oil from the oleoresin obtained from  Pinus palustris  and other species of  Pinaceae.
Passiflora Coccinea Callus Extract is the extract of a callus of Passiflora coccinea grown in culture, Passifloracea.
HC Red No. 1 is the hair color that conforms to the formula
HC Red No. 7 is the hair color that conforms to the formula
Argania Spinosa Seedcake Extract is the extract of the seedcake of  Argania spinosa,  Sapotaceae.
Hydrolyzed Euterpe Oleracea Fruit is the hydrolysate of the fruit of Euterpe oleraceae derived by acid, enzyme or other method of hydrolysis.
Dehydrolatanoprost is a synthetic analogue of a prostaglandin.
Hydrolyzed Rhodophyceae Extract is the hydrolysate of an extract of the alga, Rhodophyceae , derived by acid, enzyme or other method of hydrolysis

nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: KLUYVEROMYCES/LACTOBACILLUS/ABIES GRANDIS LEAF OIL FERMENT FILTRATE
chemicalDescription: Kluyveromyces/Lactobacillus/Abies Grandis Leaf Oil Ferment Filtrate is a filtrate of the product obtained by the fermentation of volatile oil derived from the leaves of Abies Grandis by the microorganisms, Kluyveromyces and Lactobacilus.
inciName: KLUYVEROMYCES/LACTOBACILLUS/ABIES GRANDIS LEAF OIL FERMENT FILTRATE
